title: Relic Trader
description:
You turn a corner and suddenly, a shadowy figure is just standing there. He pivots to face you.

"Welcome! What're ya trading?"
The figure inquires as he flares open his cloak to reveal a slew of [sine][purple]suspicious wares[/purple][/sine].

options.title: Take the Top One
options.description: Trade [gold][your top relic][/gold] for [gold][a new relic][/gold].

options.title: Take the Middle One
options.description: Trade [gold][your middle relic][/gold] for [gold][a new relic][/gold].

options.title: Take the Bottom One
options.description: Trade [gold][your bottom relic][/gold] for [gold][a new relic][/gold].

conditions: All players must own at least 5 tradable relics
notes: This event offers up to three relic trades. The three relics you can trade away are [purple]randomly selected[/purple] from your collection of tradable relics (shuffled order), and the three replacement relics are pulled from the front of the standard relic pool. You will only see trade options for relics you actually own—if you have 5 tradable relics, only the top option appears; 6+ relics shows top and middle; 7+ shows all three. Only relics marked as [gold]tradable[/gold] in their properties are eligible for trade. If the event appears when you have 0 tradable relics (edge case), a [gold]Proceed[/gold] option is shown instead.
